messages.cause: Batch job has dynamic allocation disabled but policy requires it.
messages.suggestion: Set spark.dynamic_allocation to true for batch job.

messages.cause: Job runs on 'x86_64' but the preferred architecture is 'arm64'. Compatible option 'm7g.4xlarge' is available.
messages.suggestion: Suggest migrating to m7g.4xlarge (arm64). Please validate workload compatibility and rebuild historical utilization before committing.

messages.cause: Average CPU utilization 28% is below the 35% threshold; the job may be over-provisioned.
messages.suggestion: Review the rightsizing recommendation to reduce workers or instance size.

messages.cause: Job appears over-provisioned. Reducing workers 20 -> 15 keeps projected p95 CPU 61% and memory 56% at or under the 65% target. Estimated savings $576.00/month.
